subsections.text: Accept applications for registrations, trip permits and any other document which he may be empowered to issue under any agreement authorized by § 405 (Authority to enter into agreements) ;
Collect from any applicant any and all fees required to be paid either to this state or to any other jurisdiction which is a party to such agreement;

Provide for the crediting of fees previously paid for the unexpired portion of a registration when a conversion is made from a registration issued under article 14 (Registration of Motor Vehicles) to a registration issued under such agreement;
Accept any fees which are due to this state under any such agreement which are paid to any other jurisdiction or agency and which have been transmitted to him pursuant to any such agreement;
Pay or authorize the payment of any moneys collected by him on behalf of any other jurisdiction which is party to such agreement to such other jurisdictions;
Issue any number plate or plates, cab card, trip permit or any other document which he is authorized to issue under such agreement;
Appoint agents to act for him in the issuance of trip permits, provided that such agents shall not receive compensation from the state; and
By regulation establish limitations upon the period of validity of any trip permit issued for operation in this state or the number of such permits which may be issued to any vehicle or applicant.
